title: Gateway keys settings UI (/settings/api-keys)

tests.cmd: npx playwright test e2e/gateway-keys.spec.ts (repo root, live stack)
tests.summary: committed spec green repeatedly (6+ runs across fix rounds; one wrong-cwd operator error and one hot-reload race, not product defects); web unit lane 172 green; SUITE_LEDGER census 67/67

securityWall.summary: run-level wall green at S4a; S4b adds only web UI files (re-verified by lint + FIXED-1 zones)

build.summary: green at S4a base; web changes verified by typecheck + the dev server serving them live (prod web build re-run at the run-level gate)

evidence: reviewer ran typecheck/lint/web tests/ledger census itself + mechanical locale-parity check
findings: [Material, FIXED 7544456] bare navigator.clipboard on the show-once secret (the one irreversible moment) - silent failure on http LAN/Tailscale; now the repo's guarded copyToClipboard + visible copyFailed alert
[Minor, FIXED] em dash in the spec docstring (repo rule)
[Minor, FIXED] show-once panel missing role=status (devices-page parity)
adversarialReview.note: the post-approve design rework (2d5399f/fcaaa83) is presentation-layer on platform primitives, verified by typecheck/lint/spec + the design re-audits

findings: [Medium, FIXED 7544456] revoke had no in-flight guard (double-fire) - submitRevoke short-circuits + buttons disable

adversarialTest.note: fresh-context probe incl. the API cross-check (minted key 200 on count_tokens pre-revoke, 401 post-revoke); ran against the pre-design-rework UI - the confirm interaction is re-pinned by the committed spec against the dialog

designAudit.notes: 3 rounds: 6 findings (table burst out of its card via the in-cell confirm; shell-drag at 390 hiding the primary action; orphan mint form; hand-rolled table vs ui/table; inverted status tones; wrapped button) -> platform Table/Badge/useConfirm adoption + icon-only action + responsive column collapse + named-key dialog -> CLEAN at the platform's own bar. Report + before/after screenshots in the slice dir.

video.note: 5/5 acceptance beats recorded live + vision-verified per beat (evidence mode); one selector-ambiguity re-record (row-scoped selectors + unique label); gallery link answers 206

notes: Design audit earned its keep hard: measured geometry (not vibes) drove two structural fixes onto the platform's own primitives.
